top_weaknesses: Exec summary says 'no social proof to lean on' but homepage carries three named customer testimonials — slight overstatement of trust gap.
Several evidence claims rest on a screenshot not provided as text (dead button, blank tiles, 'No reviews yet'), so cannot be independently verified from supplied evidence.
Benefit-routing and in-stock-landing experiments are partly contingent on restocking, which the report's #1 leak shows is the binding constraint — some downstream tests may be premature.
Heavy reliance on a screenshot (product-products-unwind.png) for several key claims — reviewer cannot verify pixel content, though textual evidence corroborates stockouts and no-reviews indirectly
Homepage actually carries customer testimonials, so the 'trust thin everywhere' framing slightly overstates; the gap is specifically on PDPs
Competitor moves are well-chosen but generic at the row level (subscriptions, reviews, gift kits) — transferable but not deeply differentiated per competitor

Homepage actually carries three testimonials (Max Wical, Diane Mercado, Mariah Acajabon) that exp-2 and exec summary imply don't exist anywhere—proof exists, it's just not on PDPs; framing slightly overstated.
AggregateRating schema in exp-8 presupposes reviews that exp-2 has yet to create; sequencing dependency not acknowledged.
